name: agent-data-api-builder
description: GitHub Copilot @dab chat participant for Data API Builder - create REST, GraphQL, and MCP APIs from SQL Server, Azure SQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Cosmos DB without writing code.

chatParticipants.name: dab
chatParticipants.description: Create REST, GraphQL, and MCP APIs from your database

disambiguation.description: The user wants to set up Data API Builder, create APIs from a database, or generate REST/GraphQL endpoints without writing code.
examples: Create a REST API from my SQL Server database
Set up Data API Builder for my project
Generate GraphQL endpoints from database tables
Initialize DAB with my connection string
Create an MCP server for my database

disambiguation.description: The user wants to add database tables, views, or stored procedures to their DAB configuration.
examples: Add the Products table to DAB
Expose my stored procedures as API endpoints
Add all tables from my database
Create an entity for the Orders view
Add relationships between entities

disambiguation.description: The user wants to configure DAB settings like authentication, caching, CORS, or endpoint paths.
examples: Enable caching for my DAB API
Configure JWT authentication for DAB
Set up CORS for localhost
Enable the MCP endpoint
Change the REST API path

disambiguation.description: The user wants to start, stop, validate, or troubleshoot Data API Builder.
examples: Start the DAB server
Validate my DAB configuration
Why is DAB not connecting to my database
Check if my DAB config is valid
Run Data API Builder

languageModelTools.name: dab_cli
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute Data API Builder (DAB) CLI commands to create and manage REST, GraphQL, and MCP APIs from databases. Use this tool to: initialize DAB configs (init), add entities like tables/views/stored procedures (add), update entity settings (update), configure runtime options (configure), validate configs (validate), start the server (start), or check status (status). DO NOT use this for schema discovery - use get_schema instead.

parameters.description: Parameters for the command (e.g., entityName, source, databaseType)

languageModelTools.name: get_schema
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve comprehensive database schema metadata from SQL Server including tables, views, stored procedures, functions, columns, parameters, indexes, and foreign key relationships. Use this tool to discover database structure before adding entities to DAB. This is read-only and does not modify anything.

connection_string.description: SQL Server connection string (e.g., Server=localhost;Database=mydb;Integrated Security=true)

filter.description: Filter results to specific object types

schema_name.description: Filter to a specific schema (e.g., dbo)

object_name.description: Filter to a specific object name

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run merge-agent-docs && npm run compile
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint

author: Jerry Nixon
